full_text:
Hu Chong 胡沖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Chong (胡沖). Persuaded Sun Hao not to commit suicide but to surrender to Jin instead. Hu Chong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Hu Chong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
